definition: The fourth jhāna in the standard fourfold sequence of ariya sammā samādhi.
notes: Use this record for the fourth member of ariya sammā samādhi. The repository keeps mental theme here too so the sequence remains practical and non-trance. This member should stay linked to dynamic balance, remembering, and purity rather than to blankness or absorptive rhetoric.

example_phrases.notes: Fourth member of the standard fourfold sequence.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the fourth member of the fourfold path expression of ariya sammā samādhi.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not recast as fourth absorption or fourth trance. Use fourth jhāna only where a controlled technical reason calls for the Pali.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the fourth member from drifting away from practical path handling and its linked formula expressions.
